testcase.name: test_habits_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Habit missing 'name' field assert 'name' in {'action_data': "Hey! I've been using this amazing trading platform called CrossCurrent. It's helped me track my profits and stay disciplined. Want to check it out?", 'action_type': 'send_invite', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-16T11:17:45.255315+00:00', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_108_member_visibility.py:78: in test_habits_endpoint assert "name" in habit, "Habit missing 'name' field" E AssertionError: Habit missing 'name' field E assert 'name' in {'action_data': "Hey! I've been using this amazing trading platform called CrossCurrent. It's helped me track my profits and stay disciplined. Want to check it out?", 'action_type': 'send_invite', 'active': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-16T11:17:45.255315+00:00', ...}
